THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTILLI, JUAN CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PG&E PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE THAT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OR PG & E HAD NOTICE OF THE CONDITION BEFORE JULY 14, 2009.
